title: City urges Winnipeg residents to prepare an emergency plan
Lamont teen dies by gunfire
description: A 16-year-old from Lamont was fatally shot Saturday in Bakersfield, the Kern County coroner’s office reported Monday.

title: What to know before moving into a high-rise office building in Manhattan
description: Moving into a high-rise office building in Manhattan is not the same as moving into a small street-level workspace. The address may look impressive, but the logistics can be strict.

title: Kazakhstan’s local currency bond market expands strongly, ADB says
description: Kazakhstan’s local currency bond market continued strong expansion, with government securities and overall issuance showing robust long-term growth, according to an ADB-backed report.

title: Karen Denise (Dreger) Avery
description: CHESTER — Karen Denise Avery, 66, of Chester, NH, passed away peacefully, Wednesday, April 29, 2026 at her home with her beloved dog, Lucy, by her side.

title: Paramount earnings, revenue beat expectations as streaming business offers a boost
description: Paramount Skydance topped Wall Street’s revenue and earnings estimates for the first quarter on Monday, as the media company got a boost from its streaming and film businesses. The company reported nearly $7.35 billion in first-quarter revenue, up 2% from the prior year, and lifted by the overall streaming business — which includes Paramount+, as [...] The post Paramount earnings, revenue beat expectations as streaming business offers a boost appeared first on NYT News Today .

title: Liberty’s Sabrina Ionescu to miss at least two weeks with left foot injury: source
description: NEW YORK — An MRI confirmed Sabrina Ionescu avoided significant injury, but she will start the season on the sideline. Ionescu will miss at least two weeks with a left foot injury, a source confirmed to the New York Daily News. The star guard will be re-evaluated in two weeks. The New York Post’s Madeline Kenney was first on the news. Ionescu injured her foot in the third quarter of Sunday’s ...

title: Alabama Heat Pump Rebates With Energy Efficiency Incentives: Guide Released
description: Engle Services releases a new guide exploring Alabama Power's $1,000 heat pump rebates for Alabama homeowners, covering eligibility criteria, application processes, and technical specifications for high-efficiency installations.

title: Bomb report determined to be false
description: TRAVERSE CITY — Law enforcement agencies determined a bomb report was false.
